package seed

import "context"

type Writer interface {
	ExecContext(context.Context, string, ...any) error
}

func SeedData(ctx context.Context, db Writer) error {
	if err := db.ExecContext(ctx, "INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (?, ?)", "u-1", "starter"); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return nil
}
